headline: Fortive Expands Buyback Capacity To 20 Million Shares
summary: Fortive's board increased its general repurchase authorization, adding flexibility alongside $66.7 million remaining under its special purpose buyback plan.

raw.headline: Fortive Expands Buyback Capacity To 20 Million Shares
raw.summary: Fortive's board increased its general repurchase authorization, adding flexibility alongside $66.7 million remaining under its special purpose buyback plan.

headline: Fortive Announces Replenishment of its General Share Repurchase Authorization
summary: EVERETT, Wash., May 04, 2026--Fortive Corporation ("Fortive") (NYSE: FTV) announced today that its Board of Directors approved an increase in the number of shares of Fortive’s common stock authorized under its general share repurchase program (the "General Share Repurchase Program"), with the total number of shares remaining available for repurchase under the General Share Repurchase Program following such increase equal to 20 million shares, including shares that were available prior to such in

raw.headline: Fortive Announces Replenishment of its General Share Repurchase Authorization
raw.summary: EVERETT, Wash., May 04, 2026--Fortive Corporation ("Fortive") (NYSE: FTV) announced today that its Board of Directors approved an increase in the number of shares of Fortive’s common stock authorized under its general share repurchase program (the "General Share Repurchase Program"), with the total number of shares remaining available for repurchase under the General Share Repurchase Program following such increase equal to 20 million shares, including shares that were available prior to such in

headline: Fortive Board Increases Number Of Shares Available For Buyback To 20M
summary: The shares available for repurchase under the General Share Repurchase Program are in addition to approximately $66.7 million available under the $550 million special purpose share repurchase program previously adopted
